task_tree.description: Delete the legacy /api/media/sign adapter so api_media no longer forwards media signing into removed legacy route doctrine.
Delete the remaining legacy media routes /media/sign and /media/stream/{token} from the legacy media router.
Validate that no legacy media sign or stream routes remain after phase-1 deletions complete.
Rewrite api_media runtime lookups to remove illegal runtime_media assumptions about id, home_player_upload_id, active, created_at, and updated_at.
Rewrite courses_service media composition so runtime_media is treated only as read-only projection truth feeding backend-authored media objects.
Validate that runtime-media consumers use only canonical projection columns and do not preserve invented mutable-table semantics.
Implement canonical media-asset repository helpers for uploaded-state transition and worker-bound readiness/failure boundaries without direct ready writes.
Rewrite api_media helper usage so route logic consumes canonical media-asset helpers and no longer assumes passthrough-ready or alternate repository payloads.
Validate that media-asset helper alignment preserves the canonical worker-only readiness boundary and does not expose storage-derived media truth.
Implement canonical home-audio composition in courses_service using home-player curation membership plus unified media read composition.
Rewrite the home audio route so it consumes canonical home-audio composition only and does not infer media truth from legacy or invented runtime fields.
Validate that home-audio output is fully backend-authored, uses unified media composition, and does not depend on invented runtime_media columns.
Run aggregate media verification to confirm that legacy sign/stream paths, direct ready writes, invented runtime_media columns, and raw playback_url or download_url contract payloads are absent.
